title: THE FEASIBILITY OF APPLYING THE "SOCKET SHIELD" METHOD IN DENTAL IMPLANTOLOGY
author: A.V. Jdanov, N.N. Tuygunov, O.U. Agzamova, Kh.T. Nurmatova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article analyzes the “socket shield” technique based on reliable international research findings. Clinical procedure outcomes were also reviewed, and the biological feasibility of using this method to preserve the volume of the tooth socket after extraction was discussed.
steps_raw: This article analyzes the “socket shield” technique based on reliable international research findings. Clinical procedure outcomes were also reviewed, and the biological feasibility of using this method to preserve the volume of the tooth socket after extraction was discussed.
